description: 18.04 TACTICAL disembark, driven end-to-end through the REAL player UI (complements disembark_then_advance_11e, which injects positions via dispatch_action). From a stationary transport the player: (1) selects the embarked unit's row -> the Disembark dialog appears saying the transport 'has not moved'; (2) confirms and PLACES EACH MODEL by clicking the board within 3"; (3) is then offered the move decision. Asserts all three options -- Normal Move, Advance and Remain Still -- are visible and enabled with the mode decision OPEN (mode_locked=false), then exercises 'stay still' (Remain Still) through Confirm Movement Mode and checks the unit completes its activation. A clean owner-2 (active player) transport + squad is injected so the disembarked unit is unengaged.

steps.comment: Inject a stationary active-player transport carrying a 3-model squad; refresh the phase snapshot + unit list.
Select the embarked unit's row (real _on_unit_selected path) -> opens the Disembark dialog.
The dialog reports the transport has not moved (tactical disembark) and the Disembark button is enabled.
DisembarkController is live: tactical mode, 3" set-up.
Place model 1 by clicking the board within 3" of the transport.
CORE: after placing every model, all three move options are offered with the decision OPEN.
steps.script:
var mc = tree.current_scene.movement_controller
var am = PhaseManager.get_current_phase_instance().active_moves.get("TST_BOYZ", {})
if am.get("mode_locked", true):
	return "mode_locked was true"
var nr = mc.normal_radio
var ar = mc.advance_radio
var sr = mc.stationary_radio
var move_ok = nr != null and nr.visible and not nr.disabled
var advance_ok = ar != null and ar.visible and not ar.disabled
var still_ok = sr != null and sr.visible and not sr.disabled
if move_ok and advance_ok and still_ok:
	return "ALL_THREE_OFFERED"
return "move=%s advance=%s still=%s" % [move_ok, advance_ok, still_ok]

steps.comment: Exercise 'stay still' (Remain Still) through the real Confirm Movement Mode flow.
steps.script:
var mc = tree.current_scene.movement_controller
var sr = mc.stationary_radio
mc.normal_radio.button_pressed = false
mc.advance_radio.button_pressed = false
sr.button_pressed = true
sr.emit_signal("pressed")
mc._on_remain_stationary_pressed()
if not (mc.confirm_mode_button.visible and not mc.confirm_mode_button.disabled):
	return "confirm button not enabled"
mc._on_confirm_mode_pressed()
return "confirmed"

steps.comment: The unit has completed its activation.
steps.script:
var u = GameState.get_unit("TST_BOYZ")
return u.get("flags", {}).get("moved", false) == true
